narration: Ever wonder why you sweat? It's your body's secret weapon against heat.
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you sweat? It's your body's secret weapon against heat.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you sweat? It's your body's secret weapon against heat.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wonder why you sweat? It's your body's secret weapon against heat.

narration: When your body heats up, it triggers sweat glands to release moisture onto your skin.
visual_description: Context visual: When your body heats up, it triggers sweat glands to release moisture onto your skin.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: When your body heats up, it triggers sweat glands to release moisture onto your skin.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: When your body heats up, it triggers sweat glands to release moisture onto your skin.

narration: But here's the twist: that sweat doesn't cool you directly.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But here's the twist: that sweat doesn't cool you directly.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But here's the twist: that sweat doesn't cool you directly.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But here's the twist: that sweat doesn't cool you directly.

narration: It's all about evaporation. As sweat evaporates, it takes heat away from your skin.
visual_description: Evidence visual: It's all about evaporation. As sweat evaporates, it takes heat away from your skin.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: It's all about evaporation. As sweat evaporates, it takes heat away from your skin.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: It's all about evaporation. As sweat evaporates, it takes heat away from your skin.

narration: This process is called evaporative cooling, and it keeps your body temperature just right.
visual_description: Payoff visual: This process is called evaporative cooling, and it keeps your body temperature just right.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: This process is called evaporative cooling, and it keeps your body temperature just right.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: This process is called evaporative cooling, and it keeps your body temperature just right.

narration: Next time you sweat, remember: it's your body’s way of keeping cool. Tap to learn more about your amazing biology!
